steps.title: Wash the basket with water, transfer...
steps.instruction: Wash the basket with water, transfer the embryos from the net to the glass vial with containing 1x PBS using the brush.

steps.title: Transfer aged embryos from juice plate(s)...
steps.instruction: Transfer aged embryos from juice plate(s) to the basket, wash with water and put into the container with 5x diluted sodium hypochlorite 6-14% for 2 minutes. Check dechorionation under the binocular microscope.

steps.title: Wait until embryos go down, remove the PBS, add 3
steps.instruction: Wait until embryos go down, remove the PBS, add 3.6 mL of 1x PBS. Add 4 mL of heptane and 400 µL of 37% formaldehyde.

steps.title: Remove the lower phase, add 5 mL of methanol
steps.instruction: Remove the lower phase, add 5 mL of methanol. Shake vigorously by hand for a bit more than 1 minute.

steps.title: Wait until the majority of embryos sink
steps.instruction: Wait until the majority of embryos sink. Remove the liquid.

steps.title: Add 5 mL of methanol, shake...
steps.instruction: Add 5 mL of methanol, shake briefly, wait until embryos sink. Transfer the embryos in methanol to 1.5 ml eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Transfer the embryos to eppendorf
steps.instruction: Transfer the embryos to eppendorf. Add 500 µL of methanol and 500 µL of H2O MQ. Place on rotator for 00:10:00

steps.title: Transfer to 1
steps.instruction: Transfer to 1.5 ml eppendorf tube, wash 3x 00:05:00 with 1 mL PBST.

steps.title: Dilute primary antibodies (according to antibody...
steps.instruction: Dilute primary antibodies (according to antibody reference) in 500 µL of PBSBT for each sample. Add antibody mix to your samples. Place at rotator in the cold room overnight.

steps.title: Remove the primary antibodies from your...
steps.instruction: Remove the primary antibodies from your samples and save them for a potential reuse. Wash embryos 3x 00:05:00 with PBSBT. Wash 3x 00:15:00 with PBSBT.

steps.title: Add secondary antibodies (fluorescent) according to...
steps.instruction: Add secondary antibodies (fluorescent) according to primary (organism) diluted 1:800 in 500 µL PBSBT. Cover the tubes in foil and place on rotator for 02:00:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Wash 3x 00:05:00 and 4x 00:20:00 with PBSBT
steps.instruction: Wash 3x 00:05:00 and 4x 00:20:00 with PBSBT. Wash 00:30:00 with PBS

steps.title: Add 50 µL of VectaShield mounting medium (with DAPI)
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL of VectaShield mounting medium (with DAPI). Mount on glass slides.
